mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_NM , D.DEPT_NM , J.JBGD_NM , CAST(#{workWeekStartDate} AS DATE) AS WORK_WEEK_START_DATE , CAST(COUNT(T.WORK_YMD) AS INTEGER) AS WORK_DAYS , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(T.WORK_HR, ''), '0')::INTEGER), 0) AS INTEGER) AS TOTAL_WORK_HR , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN T.LATE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS LATE_COUNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN T.EARLY_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS EARLY_COUNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN T.OVERTIME_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS OVERTIME_COUNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(T.OVERTIME_HR, ''), '0')::INTEGER), 0) AS INTEGER) AS TOTAL_OVERTIME_HR FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN JOB_GRADE J ON U.JBGD_CD = J.JBGD_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TIME_AND_ATTENDANCE T ON U.USER_ID = T.USER_ID AND T.WORK_YMD >= CAST(#{workWeekStartDate} AS DATE) AND T.WORK_YMD < CAST(#{workWeekStartDate} AS DATE) + INTERVAL '7 DAY' WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY U.USER_ID , U.USER_NM , D.DEPT_NM , J.JBGD_NM
